currentState: Emergency trust formed under terror. Mira latches onto Neral as the first adult who feels safe, and Neral immediately adjusts herself into protector, translator, and escort.
powerDynamic: Neral has all the practical authority — movement, food, horse, route — but uses it by reducing fear instead of intensifying it. Mira yields because Neral makes yielding survivable.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Neral approaches the cellar with empty hands and lowered height, letting Mira see safety before hearing promises.
Once Mira is mounted, Neral keeps her close in front of the saddle and wraps protection around her without crowding her into panic.

nameUsage.neralCallsMira: Uses plain reassurance and practical instructions, then warmer direct address once Mira is moving.
nameUsage.miraCallsNeral: Does not use much address on-page; trust shows more through attachment and compliance than through naming.

history.event: Neral is the ranger who gets Mira out of the cellar, earns her first scraps of trust, and becomes the obvious escort north once the warning is ready.

trajectory: Strangers in crisis -> rescue bond -> northbound protector-and-survivor pairing.
